docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY ANDERSON, CHERIE AS TO DEFENDANT 650 HOWARD -CLUB DEJAVOU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 650 HOWARD -CLUB DEJAVOU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, CHERIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 650 HOWARD -CLUB DEJAVOU $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $290.00, TO REIMBURSE FOR HER COAT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
